'''vovayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabalistic|cabalistic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-v-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabalistic|cabalistic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vovayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vovayithi|vovayithi]] || [[word:vovayiji|vovayiji]] || [[word:vovayishi|vovayishi]] || [[word:vovayiki|vovayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vovayuthuthu|vovayuthuthu]] || [[word:vovayujuju|vovayujuju]] || [[word:vovayushushu|vovayushushu]] || [[word:vovayukuku|vovayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vovayuthu|vovayuthu]] || [[word:vovayuju|vovayuju]] || [[word:vovayushu|vovayushu]] || [[word:vovayuku|vovayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vovayufthuf|vovayufthuf]] || [[word:vovayufjuf|vovayufjuf]] || [[word:vovayufshuf|vovayufshuf]] || [[word:vovayufkuf|vovayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vovayethe|vovayethe]] || [[word:vovayeje|vovayeje]] || [[word:vovayeshe|vovayeshe]] || [[word:vovayeke|vovayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vovayothotho|vovayothotho]] || [[word:vovayojojo|vovayojojo]] || [[word:vovayoshosho|vovayoshosho]] || [[word:vovayokoko|vovayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vovayotho|vovayotho]] || [[word:vovayojo|vovayojo]] || [[word:vovayosho|vovayosho]] || [[word:vovayoko|vovayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vovayofthof|vovayofthof]] || [[word:vovayofjof|vovayofjof]] || [[word:vovayofshof|vovayofshof]] || [[word:vovayofkof|vovayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vovayÃŸfthÃŸf|vovayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vovayÃŸfjÃŸf|vovayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vovayÃŸfshÃŸf|vovayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vovayÃŸfkÃŸf|vovayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vovayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|vovayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vovayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|vovayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vovayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|vovayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vovayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|vovayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vovayÃŸfthÃŸf|vovayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vovayÃŸfjÃŸf|vovayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vovayÃŸfshÃŸf|vovayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vovayÃŸfkÃŸf|vovayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vovayÃŸfthÃŸf|vovayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vovayÃŸfjÃŸf|vovayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vovayÃŸfshÃŸf|vovayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vovayÃŸfkÃŸf|vovayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vovayÃḊthÃḊ|vovayÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:vovayÃḊjÃḊ|vovayÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:vovayÃḊshÃḊ|vovayÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:vovayÃḊkÃḊ|vovayÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vovayathatha|vovayathatha]] || [[word:vovayajaja|vovayajaja]] || [[word:vovayashasha|vovayashasha]] || [[word:vovayakaka|vovayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vovayatha|vovayatha]] || [[word:vovayaja|vovayaja]] || [[word:vovayasha|vovayasha]] || [[word:vovayaka|vovayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vovayafthaf|vovayafthaf]] || [[word:vovayafjaf|vovayafjaf]] || [[word:vovayafshaf|vovayafshaf]] || [[word:vovayafkaf|vovayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vovayasha|vovayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vovayshÃḋsha|vovayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vovayrosha|vovayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vovaymusha|vovaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vovayasha|vovayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govovaynkshÃḋsha|govovaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govovaynkrosha|govovaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govovaynkmusha|govovaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govovaynkyasha|govovaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vovavayasha|vovavayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vovavayshÃḋsha|vovavayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vovavayrosha|vovavayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vovavaymusha|vovavaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vovavayasha|vovavayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govovavaynkshÃḋsha|govovavaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govovavaynkrosha|govovavaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govovavaynkmusha|govovavaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govovavaynkyasha|govovavaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vevÃḊyasha|vevÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vevÃḊyshÃḋsha|vevÃḊyshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vevÃḊyrosha|vevÃḊyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vevÃḊymusha|vevÃḊymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vevÃḊyasha|vevÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govevÃḊynkshÃḋsha|govevÃḊynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govevÃḊynkrosha|govevÃḊynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govevÃḊynkmusha|govevÃḊynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govevÃḊynkyasha|govevÃḊynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vovfayasha|vovfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vovfayshÃḋsha|vovfayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vovfayrosha|vovfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vovfaymusha|vovfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vovfayasha|vovfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govovfaynkshÃḋsha|govovfaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govovfaynkrosha|govovfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govovfaynkmusha|govovfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govovfaynkyasha|govovfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
